_comment: Routines engine config -- schedule + task templates for recurring dispatcher intake.

_schema.routine_id: unique stable key -- used for backlog dedup and state tracking
_schema.task_template: merged with auto-fill defaults in backlog_append()

task_template.description: Run /security-audit and produce structured report of findings
task_template.goal_context: Continuous security posture -- identify any new gaps since last audit
isc: A new security audit report exists in history/security/ dated today | Verify: find history/security -name '*audit*' -newer data/routine_state.json
No CRITICAL findings left unresolved | Verify: Review security audit output for CRITICAL severity items

task_template.description: Run /learning-capture synthesis pass over accumulated signals
task_template.goal_context: Learning compounds -- distill recent signals into a synthesis document; update TELOS if warranted
isc: A new synthesis document exists in memory/learning/synthesis/ dated today | Verify: find memory/learning/synthesis -name '*.md' -newer data/routine_state.json
Synthesis file contains signal references | Verify: grep -ril signal memory/learning/synthesis/

task_template.description: Run /update-steering-rules --audit to prune, merge, and categorize steering rules in CLAUDE.md
task_template.goal_context: CLAUDE.md steering rules decay -- stale rules waste context tokens every session; audit merges related rules and archives completed-phase references
isc: CLAUDE.md steering rule count is at or below 45 after audit | Verify: grep -c '^- ' CLAUDE.md
CLAUDE.md file size is at or below 20KB after audit | Verify: find . -name 'CLAUDE.md' -size -20k
A history/decisions/ entry documents the steering audit rationale | Verify: find history/decisions -name '*steering*' -newer data/routine_state.json
task_template.notes: Routine-injected by routines engine -- tier 1, human review recommended

task_template.description: Run prediction backtest producer -- execute up to 3 unrun historical events from backtest_events.yaml
task_template.goal_context: Prediction calibration bootstrap -- run constrained historical predictions to build accuracy signal base
isc: At least 1 new backtest prediction file written to data/predictions/backtest/ | Verify: find data/predictions/backtest -name '*.md' -newer data/backtest_state.json
All output files carry backtested=true and leakage_risk=HIGH in frontmatter | Verify: grep -l 'backtested: true' data/predictions/backtest/*.md
backtest_state.json updated with run date for each executed event | Verify: Read data/backtest_state.json
task_template.notes: Runs prediction_backtest_producer.py -- outputs tagged pending_review, require Eric approval before calibration use

task_template.description: Run prediction weekly review task -- surface due predictions and backtest reviews in Slack
task_template.goal_context: Close the prediction resolution loop -- Eric resolves via Slack reply to keep calibration data flowing
isc: Slack notification posted to #epdev listing all predictions due within 30 days | Verify: Check #epdev Slack for prediction_review message dated today
Log file written to data/logs/prediction_review_{date}.log | Verify: find data/logs -name 'prediction_review_*' -newer data/routine_state.json
No forward prediction open for >90 days without a resolution prompt | Verify: Read log file (anti-criterion)
task_template.notes: Runs prediction_review_task.py -- low-cost Slack surface task

task_template.description: Run prediction calibration loop -- compute per-domain accuracy and bias adjustments
task_template.goal_context: Calibration feedback -- compute domain-specific accuracy and inject adjustments into /make-prediction
isc: data/calibration.json exists with per-domain adjustment values | Verify: Read data/calibration.json
data/calibration_narrative.md exists with prose bias summary | Verify: test -f data/calibration_narrative.md

Calibration adjustments are within [-0.15, +0.15] bounds | Verify: python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('data/calibration.json')); assert all(-0.15<=v['adjustment']<=0.15 for v in d['domains'].values())"
No calibration signal written without >= 20 forward-looking resolved predictions | Verify: Check calibration.json threshold field (anti-criterion)
task_template.notes: Runs prediction_calibration.py -- checks threshold before executing; haiku for counting, sonnet for analysis
